NL.R1: The customer data must be received before the individual risk assessment can take place
NL.R2: The customer advisor must provide the two obligatory brochures WpHG Customer  Information and the Basic Information Securities and Capital Investment
NL.R3: After concluding the custody account contract, the customer legitimation and the  account documents need to be send to market support.
NL.R4: The investment advice needs to be conducted by a customer advisor with a securities competence of level C or above.
NL.R5: The customer identification and legitimation must be handled by the customer advisor, while suspected cases of money laundering must be checked by an antimoney-laundering officer.
NL.R6: Before concluding a custody-account contract, the customer advisor needs to wait until the suspected case of anti-money laundering is resolved.
NL.R7: The customer information must be updated with every future customer contact.

Humanmade.R5: executed_by('conduct customer identification & legitimation', 'customer advisor') and executed_by('legitimiation of suspected customer', 'money laundering officer')
Humanmade.R6: precedence('conclude custody account', 'conduct customer identification & legitimation') or precedence('conclude custody account', 'legitimation of suspected customer') and executed_by('conclude custody account', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows('data.customer_status == "untrusted"', 'legitimation of suspected customer')

Generated1.R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor with securities competence level C or above')
Generated1.R5: executed_by(tree, 'handle customer identification and legitimation', 'customer advisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check suspected money laundering case', 'anti-money-laundering officer')
Generated1.R6: precedence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve suspected money laundering case')
